name: Amaretto Cheesecake Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 package Cream cheese, 8 oz at room Temp
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour and brown sugar.
2. Cut in butter until mixture forms fine crumbs.
3. Reserve 1 cup crumb mixture for topping. Press the remainder over bottom of ungreased 8 inch square baking pan.
4. Bake for 12-15 minutes at 350°F or until lightly browned.
5. In a mixer bowl, thoroughly cream together cream cheese and granulated sugar.
6. Add egg, amaretto, and vanilla; beat well.
7. Spread batter over partially baked crust.
8. Combine almonds with reserved crumb mixture; sprinkle over batter.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes. Cool and cut into squares.
